posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran's Fars News says the Strait of Hormuz will remain under Iran's management contrary to President Trump's announcement.

Just one hour ago, President Trump said a deal with Iran will be "announced shortly" which would reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
